title: Fixing Cells with Paraformaldehyde (PFA)

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"58r4v","text":"Needed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1miue","text":"16% Formaldehyde ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":17}],"data":[]},{"key":"159oi","text":"PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3v3ju","text":"Ice","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7ctjg","text":"Working Dilutions:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":18},{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2bobq","text":"Thawed aliquots are stable at 4º C for up to 2 weeks.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1lcdt","text":"Dilute 1 part 2% PFA to 3 parts cells in PBS (eg 60 µl + 180 µl to yield 0.5% final concentration).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"62A7C769E3CE4A268D7029C3FE2546CA","url":"http://www.canemco.com/product-catalog/chemicals/18-products/96-fixatives#16%_Formaldehyde_Solution"}}}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"kjja","text":"Samples should never be left in PFA overnight.  This dramatically increases the amount of autofluorescence your samples. Diluted PFA (2-4% solutions) are only good for 1 week, therefore always date you PFA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare PFA from powder Paraformaldehyde (PFA) from Powder by Verve Team
Dilute with PBS. Dilute only the amount of PFA you will need per experiment to 4% PFA from the 16% stock
Store the undiluted stock at -20°C until needed. Open stocks should only be kept for one month
Add and equal volume of the 4% stock to samples to end up with a final concentration of at most 2% PFA. Fixation can be done from 0.5-2%.
Fix cells on ice for 15-30 minutes on ice, 00:30:00 Fixation can be done from 0.5-2%.
Wash 2x with PBS Fixation can be done from 0.5-2%.
authors: Faculty of Medicine Flow Cytometry Facility
creator: Verve Team
